case_title: ELAINE LAN LI ET AL VS. JIAN HONG LI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: 0) SERVED JUN-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JIAN HONG

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JIAN HONG
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: 0) SERVED MAY-30-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JIAN HONG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, ELAINE LAN LI, ABE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI, JIAN HONG $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TEMPORARY USE OF A NONCERTIFIED OR NONREGISTERED SPOKEN LANGUAGE INTERPRETER AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JIAN HONG
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, ELAINE LAN LI, ABE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JIAN HONG
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LI, ELAINE LAN LI, ABE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JIAN HONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE FILED BY LI, ELAINE LAN LI, ABE LI, JIAN HONG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. ALL PARTIES STIPULATE TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS, ELAINE LAN LI AND ABE LI. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, JIAN HONG LI, WITH CANTONESE INTERPRETER ANNA YU. DEFENDANT WAIVES TIME ON SERVICE OF PROCESS. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LI, JIAN HONG
